why.title: Why MK Digital Systems?
why.description: Minimal architecture, fast delivery and long-lasting software infrastructure. We bring your projects to life without unnecessary complexity.
why.feature1Desc: Projects ready in days, not weeks.
why.feature2Desc: Easy to maintain and scalable software infrastructure.
why.feature3Desc: The combination of field experience and software discipline.

process.title: Project Process
process.step1Desc: We analyze your project and goals in a short meeting.
process.step2Desc: The most suitable software architecture and user experience are planned.
process.step3Desc: The project is built with clean, scalable code.
process.step4Desc: The project goes live and technical support is provided.

services.title: Services
services.heroSubtitle: Services tailored to your needs with modern web, mobile and SaaS solutions.

projects.title: Projects

about.title: About
about.heroSubtitle: Who we are and how we work.
about.intro: MK Digital Systems is a studio focused on building corporate websites, SaaS dashboards, and digital products—combining design and engineering in one workflow. We don't just make things look good; we build fast, reliable systems that support your business goals.
about.howWeWork1: We clarify scope first, then move into design and development.
about.howWeWork2: One point of contact, transparent process.
about.howWeWork3: No surprises: timeline, revisions, and scope are defined upfront.
about.howWeWork4: Mobile-first, performance, and SEO are baseline standards.
about.howWeWork5: After launch, we provide quick support for small needs.
about.whatWeDeliver1: Corporate websites: modern, trustworthy, and fast.
about.whatWeDeliver2: Admin panels / dashboards tailored to your workflow.
about.whatWeDeliver3: Custom systems: forms, automations, CMS, integrations.
about.whatWeDeliver5: Scalable architecture: built for the long term.
about.toolsDescription: The technologies we use depend on the project requirements. Our goal is to build fast, reliable and maintainable systems.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heroSubtitle: Get in touch or message us directly on WhatsApp.
contact.name: Name

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: MK Digital Systems respects your privacy and is committed to protecting any information you may provide while using our website or services. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we keep it secure.
privacy.section1Intro: We may collect limited personal information when you contact us or request a service. This may include:
privacy.section1Item4: Project details or messages you send
privacy.section1Note: This information is collected only for communication and service purposes.
privacy.section2Intro: The information you provide may be used to:
privacy.section2Item4: Improve our website and user experience
privacy.section2Note: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties.
privacy.section3Body: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
privacy.section4Body: Our website may use trusted third-party services such as hosting providers or analytics tools. These services may process limited technical data required for the operation of the website.
privacy.section5Body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, you may contact us directly.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.heroSubtitle: Please read before using our services.
terms.intro: By accessing or using MK Digital Systems' website and services, you agree to the following Terms of Use. These terms explain site usage, intellectual property, service scope, responsibilities, and legal matters.
terms.section1Body: These Terms apply to MK Digital Systems' website (and related pages) and all content and services provided through it.
terms.section2Body: MK Digital Systems provides software development, web development, system setup/consulting, and digital solution services. The final scope is defined through a proposal, agreement, email, or written approval.
terms.section3Item1: You may not use the site for unlawful purposes.
terms.section3Item2: You are responsible for the accuracy of information submitted via forms.
terms.section3Item3: You must not attempt to compromise security, overload systems, or disrupt service availability.
terms.section4Body: Unless otherwise stated, all texts, designs, visuals, logos, and brand elements belong to MK Digital Systems. They may not be copied, reproduced, or redistributed without permission.
terms.section5Item1: Proposals may be time-limited and pricing may change if scope changes.
terms.section5Item2: Delivery timelines can be updated based on scope, approvals, and client feedback speed.
terms.section5Item3: Third-party license, service, or API fees may apply separately.
terms.section6Body: We may use hosting, analytics, payment providers, or external services. Their terms and policies apply.
terms.section7Body: The website is provided "as is." Liability for interruptions, data loss, or indirect damages is limited to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.section8Body: Personal data is handled according to our Privacy Policy. These Terms complement that policy.
terms.section9Body: MK Digital Systems may update these Terms when needed. The latest version becomes effective once published on the website.
terms.section10Body: If you have questions about these Terms, you may contact us.
